twocol.label: Two-column
twocol.detection: features-stacked-content widget; module_features-stacked-content CSS; features-stacked-content section class

faq.label: FAQ
faq.detection: dl.faqs; faq-widget; module_FAQs CSS; FAQPage JSON-LD; pricing accordion (js-faq-heading)

stats-section.label: Stats section
stats-section.detection: module_stats-set CSS (page-level stats bar, not stacked global widget)

dual-quote.label: Dual quote
dual-quote.detection: Two or more module_quote sections on same page

twocol-text-heavy.label: Two-column · text-heavy
twocol-text-heavy.detection: No unique HubSpot marker yet — variant of Two-column
